confidence_rationale: Video classification as expert_demo is clear from smooth, flawless execution well within expert benchmark (40-60s). All phases visible and measurable. No ambiguity in peg placement or transfer accuracy. Completion time clearly estimable from frame progression. Expert-level performance with zero penalties is unambiguous.
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level peg transfer performance. Completion time of 52 seconds well within expert benchmark of 40-60 seconds. Perfect execution with all 6 pegs successfully transferred in both directions with zero drops or misplacements. Demonstrates superior instrument control, efficient sequencing, and coordinated bimanual manipulation.
